name: BizConf Telecom Co.,Ltd.
summary: BizConf Telecom Co.,Ltd. provides remote virtual conferencing services for internal and external communication of business in China and internationally. The company offers audio conferencing, Web conferencing, video conferencing, and Webcasting services, as well as builds SaaS cloud video service platform. It provides solutions for hardware, HR, financial, retail, and medical sectors. The company has strategic partnerships with China Telecom, China Unicom, China Mobile, Tata Communication, Singtel, Telstra, PCCW, BT, Starhub, etc. BizConf Telecom Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is based in Shanghai, China.
